terms.label: I agree to the <0>ToS</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>

success.title: You're signed in!
success.description: The desktop app should open automatically. If it doesn't, copy the code below and paste it in the app.

success.title: Code successfully copied
success.description: You can now paste it into the app.

error.title: Failed to copy code
error.description: Please try to copy it manually instead.

failed.title: Authentication failed
failed.description: Please try signing in again. If the problem persists, please <0>let us know</0>.

magic.title: Verify your email
magic.description: We've sent a verification code to your email address. Please copy and paste the code here:

invalid.title: Invalid or expired code
invalid.description: The code you entered is either invalid or has expired. Please double-check your code and try again.
